AboutPage.title: About IPHINT
AboutPage.subtitle: Built by Engineers. Designed for Everyone.

sections.title: Built by Engineers. Designed for Everyone.
paragraphs: IPHINT was founded by two brothers, both computer engineers.

For a long time, we observed a recurring problem: powerful technologies and tools existed, but most were built exclusively for enterprises, making them too complex and expensive for individuals. Image theft detection was no exception.
The sophisticated technology was there, but the number of people who could actually use it was extremely limited.
sections.callout: Why can't individuals have access to this technology?

sections.title: Making Enterprise Technology Accessible
paragraphs: IPHINT aims to bring enterprise-level image detection technology to everyone. Our system is designed to protect your content without requiring complex setups or specialized technical knowledge.
While we make the technology simple to use, we never compromise on its performance or core capabilities.

sections.title: Built by Engineers Who Understand the Problem
paragraphs: We didn't just build a service; we understood the problem and engineered the solution.

We have directly researched how images are modified, how they spread, and why traditional methods fail to detect them. As a result, we have built a detection system that works in real-world environments, going far beyond a simple search.

sections.title: From Tools to Infrastructure
paragraphs: IPHINT is more than just a tool or a feature. It is an infrastructure that empowers everyone, from individuals to corporations, to protect their image IP.

sections.title: Our Mission
paragraphs: Our mission is to bridge the technology gap. We exist to make technologies that were once reserved for large enterprises available to individuals. Through our service, creators and brands of all sizes can easily access digital content IP protection.

about.title: About IpHint
about.subtitle: The easiest way to monitor your content.

commonReality.title: Common Reality
commonReality.subtitle: Digital content, Fast to infringe, easy to steal.
commonReality.infoBoxBody: As social media and web platforms explode, tracking where and how your work is stolen has become virtually impossible. While only 3% of creators take action against infringement, the remaining 97% are left unprotected and exposed to theft.
commonReality.source: ipHint Internal Analysis Source: Global Image Theft Report & Internal Analysis

ourSolution.title: Our Solution
ourSolution.subtitle: Securing Brands and Creators Against Digital Risks
ourSolution.infoBoxTitle: Identify every modification with direct image data analysis.
ourSolution.infoBoxBody: In a sea of digital content, we provide the technical edge to secure your brand and creative rights.

ourService.title: Our Service
ourService.subtitle: Digital Content IP Protection & Monitoring Tool
bullets: Monitoring technology used to be an exclusive, high-cost service available only to large corporations.
Individual creators and small-to-medium brands have faced significant entry barriers in protecting their own rights.
Now, our scalable monitoring technology makes it possible to protect intellectual property regardless of your business size.
ourService.infoBoxTitle: top manual searches. Start protecting your work.
ourService.infoBoxBody: Our technology uses digital fingerprinting to detect even modified or altered content. With 24/7 automated monitoring, we alert you the moment infringement happensâ€”keeping you one step ahead in securing your rights.

Pricing.heading: Pricing
Pricing.subheading: Autonomy for all. Choose the best plan for you.

starter.name: STARTER
starter.subtext: Register for free with a referral code

pro.name: PRO
pro.subtext: About half the price of Starter

items.question: How does monitoring work?
items.answer: Our intelligent AI scans the entire web 24/7 without gaps based on your registered images. As soon as a similar image is discovered, it undergoes a detailed analysis and is recorded on your dashboard, with real-time alerts to help you take immediate action. For optimized data management, all discovered data is kept securely for 30 days.

items.question: What happens when I reach my cumulative discovery limit?
items.answer: Once the limit is exceeded, monitoring and alerts for new discoveries will be paused. To continue using the service without interruption, you can upgrade to a higher plan or wait until your limit resets on the next billing date. (The Premium plan offers unlimited access with no discovery limits!)

items.question: Can I change my plan in the middle of a subscription?
items.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time! When upgrading, you only pay the difference for the remaining period and can enjoy the expanded benefits immediately. Downgrades will take effect starting from the next billing cycle after the current one ends.

items.question: What happens if I cancel during an annual subscription?
items.answer: Even after canceling, you can continue to use all features normally until the end of your current pre-paid subscription period. Your subscription will simply not renew for the following year. However, since annual plans include a discount, mid-term refunds may be limited according to our Terms of Service.

items.question: What happens to my registered images if I delete my account?
items.answer: Upon account deletion, all registered images and monitoring data are immediately and permanently destroyed to protect your personal information and valuable creative works. Since deleted data cannot be recovered, we recommend downloading any necessary reports before closing your account.
